Package org.rodinp.internal.core

Class RodinProject

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.runtime.PlatformObject
org.rodinp.core.basis.RodinElement
org.rodinp.internal.core.Openable
org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinProject
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.core.runtime.IAdaptable, IOpenable, IParent, IRodinElement, IRodinProject
public class RodinProject extends Openable implements IRodinProject
Handle for a Rodin Project.
See Also:
  • IRodinProject

  • Method Details

    • hasRodinNature

      public static boolean hasRodinNature(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject project)
      Returns true if the given project is accessible and it has a java nature, otherwise false.
      Parameters:
      project - IProject
      Returns:
      boolean

      Description copied from class: Openable
      This element is being closed. Do any necessary cleanup.

    • computeChildren

      public void computeChildren(org.rodinp.internal.core.RodinProjectElementInfo info)
      Computes the collection of Rodin files and set it on the given info.
      Parameters:
      info - RodinProjectElementInfo

    • contains

      public boolean contains(org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource resource)

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Returns true if this handle represents the same Rodin project as the given handle. Two handles represent the same project if they are identical or if they represent a project with the same underlying resource.
      Overrides:
      equals in class RodinElement
      See Also:
      • RodinElement.equals(Object)

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:

      Returns:
      the element name

      Specified by:

    • getHandleFromMemento

      public IRodinElement getHandleFromMemento(MementoTokenizer.Token token, MementoTokenizer memento)

    • getNonRodinResources

      public org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource[] getNonRodinResources() throws RodinDBException
      Returns an array of non-Rodin resources contained in the receiver.
      Specified by:
      getNonRodinResources in interface IRodinProject
      Returns:
      an array of non-Rodin resources (IFiles and/or IFolders) directly contained in this project
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource

    • getPath

      public org.eclipse.core.runtime.IPath getPath()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the path to the innermost resource enclosing this element. The path returned is the full, absolute path to the underlying resource, relative to the workspace.

      This is a handle-only method.

      This is a convenience method fully equivalent to getOpenable().getFullPath().

      Specified by:
      getPath in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the path to the innermost resource enclosing this element

    • getPerProjectInfo

      public RodinDBManager.PerProjectInfo getPerProjectInfo() throws RodinDBException
      Throws:
      RodinDBException

    • getProject

      public org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject getProject()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProject
      Returns the IProject on which this IRodinProject was created. This is a handle-only method.
      Specified by:
      getProject in interface IRodinProject
      Returns:
      the IProject on which this IRodinProject was created

    • getResource

      public org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource getResource()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the innermost resource enclosing this element.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getResource in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the innermost resource enclosing this element

    • getUnderlyingResource

      public org.eclipse.core.resources.IResource getUnderlyingResource()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinElement
      Returns the smallest underlying resource that contains this element, or null if this element is not contained in a resource.

      This is a handle-only method.

      Specified by:
      getUnderlyingResource in interface IRodinElement
      Returns:
      the underlying resource, or null if none

    • hasBuildState

      public boolean hasBuildState()
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProject
      Returns whether this project has been built at least once and thus whether it has a build state.
      Specified by:
      hasBuildState in interface IRodinProject
      Returns:
      true if this project has been built at least once, false otherwise
      See Also:
      • IRodinProject

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Description copied from class: RodinElement
      Returns the hash code for this Rodin element. By default, the hash code for an element is a combination of its name and parent's hash code. Elements with other requirements must override this method.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class RodinElement

    • resetCaches

      public void resetCaches()

    • setProject

      public void setProject(org.eclipse.core.resources.IProject project)
      Sets the underlying kernel project of this Rodin project, and fills in its parent and name. Called by IProject.getNature().
      See Also:
      • IProjectNature.setProject(IProject)

    • getRodinFile

      public RodinFile getRodinFile(String fileName)
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProject
      Returns a handle to the primary copy of the Rodin file with the specified name in this project (for example, "toto.mdl"). The name must be a valid Rodin file name, or null will be returned.

      This is a handle-only method. The Rodin file may or may not be present.

      Specified by:
      getRodinFile in interface IRodinProject
      Parameters:
      fileName - the name of the Rodin file
      Returns:
      the Rodin file with the specified name in this project or null if the given file name doesn't correspond to a Rodin file name (for instance, wrong extension).
      See Also:
      • IRodinProject

    • getRodinFiles

      public IRodinFile[] getRodinFiles() throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProject
      Returns all the Rodin files in this project.
      Specified by:
      getRodinFiles in interface IRodinProject
      Returns:
      all of the Rodin files in this project
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this element does not exist or if an exception occurs while accessing its corresponding resource.

    • updateChildren

      public void updateChildren()
      Recomputes the lists of children - only if opened.

    • getRootElementsOfType

      public <T extends IInternalElement> T[] getRootElementsOfType(IInternalElementType<T> type) throws RodinDBException
      Description copied from interface: IRodinProject
      Returns the root elements of the Rodin files of this project that are of the given element type.
      Specified by:
      getRootElementsOfType in interface IRodinProject
      Parameters:
      type - type of the root elements to retrieve
      Returns:
      the root elements of this project that are of the given type
      Throws:
      RodinDBException - if this project does not exist, or if an exception occurs while accessing its children files
